errorText:
Error: Command failed: opencli stackoverflow hot --limit 5 -f json
ok: false
error:
  code: FETCH_ERROR
  message: HTTP 400 Bad Request from https://api.stackexchange.com/2.3/questions?order=desc&sort=hot&site=stackoverflow
  exitCode: 1
helpOutput:
Usage: opencli stackoverflow hot [options]

Hot Stack Overflow questions

Options:
  --limit [value]     Max number of results (default: "10")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: stackoverflow.com
Output columns: title, score, answers, url

errorText:

errorText:
Error: Command failed: opencli stackoverflow search mcp --limit 5 -f json
ok: false
error:
  code: FETCH_ERROR
  message: >-
    HTTP 429 Too Many Requests from
    https://api.stackexchange.com/2.3/search/advanced?order=desc&sort=relevance&q=mcp&site=stackoverflow
  exitCode: 1
helpOutput:
Usage: opencli stackoverflow search [options] <query>

Search Stack Overflow questions

Arguments:
  query               Search query

Options:
  --limit [value]     Max number of results (default: "10")
  -f, --format <fmt>  Output format: table, plain, json, yaml, md, csv (default:
                      "table")
  -v, --verbose       Debug output (default: false)
  -h, --help          display help for command

Strategy: public | Browser: no | Domain: stackoverflow.com
Output columns: title, score, answers, url
